title: Ubiquiti AP-5AC-90-HD sector antenna airPrism, 5GHz, 22dBi, 2x2 MIMO, 90° (3x 30°), for Rocket 5AC-PRISM
description: The AP-5AC-90-HD AirPrism sector antenna is the first multi sectoral antenna with 3 independent 2x2 MIMO sector antennas with a 30° radius coverage for the 5GHz band. The total airPrism antenna coverage angle is 90° . This sectoral antenna is made of the finest materials and is dedicated to reserved areas , or where you do not have much space on the mast and you need to connect more customers The three Rocket5ac Prismâ¢ radios are installed at the top, middle, and bottom of the airPrism antenna. Each radio independently transmits and receives within its corresponding 30° beamwidth Antenna Holder (3) rocket unit coverage
